leadText: The Light Clay (Japanese: ひかりのねんど Light Clay) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon holding this item uses Light Screen , Reflect , or Aurora Veil , the effects of those moves last eight turns instead of five turns. If one of these moves is stolen by Snatch , the duration depends on whether the Pokémon that ultimately uses the move holds the Light Clay (regardless of whether the original user held it). In the Generation VII games, if these effects have their duration extended by the Light Clay, the turn counter on the user interface for these effects will indicate that it lasts for 8 turns for the player whose Pokémon used the move, while it will display that it lasts for 5 turns for their opponent. After 5 turns of that effect have passed, the user interface will display that it lasts for 8 turns for both players.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of barrier moves like Light Screen and Reflect used by the holder. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of barrier moves like Light Screen and Reflect used by the holder. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. Protective moves like Light Screen and Reflect will be effective longer. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder uses protective moves like Light Screen or Reflect, their effects will last longer than usual.
